expectations.evidence: opencollection.yml exists with name: 'Blog Posts API', version: '1', type: 'collection'
environments/local.yml exists and bridges process.env.API_TOKEN via {{process.env.API_TOKEN}}, but baseUrl is hardcoded to 'http://localhost:3000' rather than bridging process.env.BASE_URL
No folder.yml files exist anywhere in the output directory. Auth is set per-request via headers, not via folder-level before-request scripts.
Happy path tests exist for all CRUD ops: create-post-success.yml (POST 201), get-post-success.yml (GET 200), update-post-success.yml (PUT 200), delete-post-success.yml (DELETE 204)
Tests exist for missing title (create-post-missing-title.yml, 400), missing body (create-post-missing-body.yml, 400), and invalid authorId (create-post-invalid-author-id.yml, 400)
get-post-not-found.yml and delete-post-not-found.yml both assert status 404 on nonexistent resource UUID

Files use version/name/type/http/assertions keys but lack the OpenCollection 'info' and 'runtime' top-level keys. Format resembles Bruno's native YAML but not strict OpenCollection spec with info/http/runtime structure.
create-post-success.yml uses bru.setVar('postId', res.body.id) in post-response script; subsequent tests reference {{postId}}
Tests use Bruno's declarative assertions format (type: status/jsonpath with operator: isDefined) rather than Chai expect() calls in scripts. No expect() usage found in any test file.
